creator: oz42@oz42.eu
text:
(In reply to Renato Botelho from comment #4)

.if ${.CURDIR:M*/ports/devel/ccache}
NO_CCACHE=yes
.endif

.if !defined(NO_CCACHE)
CC=/usr/local/libexec/ccache/world/cc
CXX=/usr/local/libexec/ccache/world/c++
.endif

KERNCONFDIR=/root
KERNCONF=FB
MODULES_OVERRIDE=mac_ntpd
#
OPTIONS_UNSET= NIS
OPTIONS_UNSET+= X11
OPTIONS_UNSET+= DOCS
OPTIONS_UNSET+= DEBUG
OPTIONS_UNSET+= WAYLAND
#
CFLAGS+=-Wno-error
